title: Nephrodium catopteron
taxonomy: Nephrodium catopteron is classified as a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. This classification places it within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. The family Matoniaceae is a small group of ferns characterized by their unique spore-bearing structures. Nephrodium catopteron is thought to be closely related to other members of the Matoniaceae family, such as the genus Pleoneuron. Further research is needed to confirm the exact relationships between Nephrodium catopteron and other fern species.
uses: Nephrodium catopteron, also known as the 'mirror fern', was used in traditional medicine for its supposed health benefits.
